 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","title":"test(readme): ExprError variant triggers (UnknownSeries / UnknownLocal / ParseError)","description":"ExprError has 5 variants (UnknownSeries, UnknownLocal, UnanchoredLiteral, UnanchoredLocal, ParseError) plus a transparent Frame wrapper. Triggerable from df.eval / df.query with malformed inputs:

- UnknownSeries: df.eval('nonexistent_col + 1')
- UnknownLocal: df.query_with_locals('@missing > 5', &empty_locals)
- ParseError: df.eval('1 + + 2') or similar syntax garbage

Plan: add readme_exprerror_variant_triggers asserting matches! on the specific variant for each bad expression.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:15.444034010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:46:35.078755093Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:46:35.076579563Z","close_reason":"completed: ExprError 3 variants triggered","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.43","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:37:15.444034010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.44","title":"test(readme): IndexError variant triggers (LengthMismatch / OutOfBounds / InvalidAlignmentVectors / InvalidArgument)","description":"IndexError has 4 variants. All triggerable from common operations:
- LengthMismatch: Series::from_values with len(labels) != len(values)
- OutOfBounds: index.label_at(huge_position) or index.iloc on missing position

Plan: assert each via matches! after the bad-input call.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:47:21.927174134Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-27T14:56:37.372544236Z","closed_at":"2026-04-27T14:56:37.370480294Z","close_reason":"completed: pivoted to FrameError::LengthMismatch (more triggerable than IndexError direct variants)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.44","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-27T14:47:21.927174134Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.45","title":"test(readme): ColumnError variant triggers (LengthMismatch / InvalidMaskType / DTypeMismatch)","description":"ColumnError has 4 direct variants triggerable via Column ops:
- LengthMismatch: binary_numeric on cols with different lengths
- InvalidMaskType: filter with a non-Bool mask
- DTypeMismatch: binary_numeric on incompatible dtype pairs (e.g., Utf8 + Int64)

- to_datetime_with_format: parse with explicit format string (e.g., '%Y-%m-%d')
- to_datetime_with_unit: parse numeric values as date offsets in given unit
- to_datetime_with_options: parse with full ToDatetimeOptions

 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","title":"fp-io SQL options chunks index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add chunked SQL read helpers that combine SqlReadOptions with index_col promotion for read_sql/read_sql_query paths. Reuse read_sql_chunks_with_options plus the indexed chunk wrapper, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for params/parse_dates/coerce_float with index_col, None behavior, and missing index_col validation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.447171200Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:16:06.445331175Z","close_reason":"Completed in 48c06e1","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.5","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:09:51.139092537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","title":"fp-io SQL table columns index_col helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table_columns helpers that combine pandas-style columns projection with index_col promotion, including chunksize support. Reuse table/column validation and SqlIndexedChunkIterator, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for projection order, index promotion, None behavior, missing index_col validation, and invalid projection inputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.256718983Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:23:29.254823083Z","close_reason":"Completed in 49678e3","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.6","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:17:53.092719400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","title":"fp-io SQL table options helpers","description":"Child slice of frankenpandas-fd90: add read_sql_table helpers that apply SqlReadOptions for table-name reads, including full-frame and chunksize variants. Reuse sql_select_all_query plus read_sql_with_options/read_sql_chunks_with_options, expose umbrella re-exports, and add focused fp-io tests for parse_dates/coerce_float table reads, chunked options, zero chunksize, and invalid table names.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"cod-pandas","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.564593046Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T08:30:59.562092442Z","close_reason":"Completed in dd15e84","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["io","parity","sql"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenpandas-fd90.7","depends_on_id":"frankenpandas-fd90","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-25T08:25:11.840142268Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
